hub_subtitle: Business English for the boardroom, the summit and the interview

lesson.menu_desc: Describing your daily routine and responsibilities -- 29 slides
lesson.subtitle: Aula 2 -- My Role & My Team -- Your Routine, Your Team, Your Responsibilities
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Danilo Febba | Aula 2 -- My Role & My Team

listenings.text: Hi Danilo, it's Sofia. Welcome to the leadership team. Let me give you a quick picture of how we work. The data team usually starts the day with a short standup at nine o'clock. During the week, the engineers handle the pipelines and track every deadline closely. We rarely deploy on Fridays, because we always keep that day for reviews and planning. As the lead, you report to me, and we catch up every Monday morning. When something urgent happens at night, one engineer is on call. It is a busy team, but a strong one. I am sure you will fit right in. Talk soon.
